page.title: A rilru a hah lutuk chuan a rilru a buai em em a. vortexx.sol — Vortex Controller

home.lede: Vortex peer-to-peer network atana thil hmuhchhuah & finfiahna controller.
home.fingerprintDesc: He public key hi i Vortex client ah pin rawh. Controller atanga chhanna zawng zawng chu a sign vek a ni — mismatch tih awmzia chu mi pakhatin a tampering tihna a ni.
home.step1: I device ah Vortex install rawh.
home.step2: Setup wizard ah §Global network mode kha thlang la.
home.step3: Controller URL (SNS hmanga auto-resolved) emaw, he site atang hian entry URL emaw paste rawh.
home.step4: I app-a pubkey chu a chunga fingerprint nen a inmil tih finfiah rawh.
home.step5: I connect tawh a ni. Thil dang zawng zawng (node ​​list, signatures) chu automatic in a handle vek a ni.
home.nodesDesc: Registered peer zawng zawng, an weight, endpoint, leh verification source te.
home.entriesDesc: A vawi khatna atana client-te tan bootstrap URL — Cloudflare tunnel, Tor, IPFS, direct.
home.mirrorsDesc: Censorship a awm chuan he signed content ang chiah hi rawngbawltu host dang.
home.securityDesc: Cryptographically verified, eng nge verified loh, leh engvangin nge tih kimchang takin.
home.peersOnline: peers te chu online ah an awm

nodes.crumb: VORTEX / NODES te chu a awm a
nodes.title: Registered node te pawh a awm
nodes.lede: Controller-in a hriat peer zawng zawng. Client te hian he list hi an chhiar a, signature chu an verify a, weight a zirin connect tur node an thlang thin. Sealed node thar chuan weight 1.0 a hmu a; stale emaw unsealed node te chu 0 lam hawiin an chhe thin avangin traffic chu nung turin a luang a, rintlak peers chauh a ni.
nodes.legendDualD: Controller-ah register a ni a, Solana kaltlangin on-chain-ah seal a ni. Independent witness pahnih chuan code hash hi an nemnghet.
nodes.legendCtrlD: HTTP controller-ah register a ni. Signature hian node hian a private key a nei tih a finfiah a, mahse code integrity hi on-chain-ah anchor a ni lo.
nodes.legendUnverifD: Config file emaw gossip atanga hriat chhuah. Authenticated a la ni lo. Fimkhur takin enkawl rawh — tu pawhin finfiahna a thlen hma loh chuan pubkey an advertise thei.

entries.crumb: VORTEX / ENTRIES THIL THAWN THAWN THIN
entries.title: URLs te entry rawh
entries.lede: Peer la nei lo client tan starting points. Entry URL tin hi controller hnena thlen theihna kawng a ni — Cloudflare tunnel, Tor, IPFS gateway, emaw direct domain kaltlangin. A hmasa berah i Vortex app-ah eng pawh copy rawh.
entries.typeTunnelT: Cloudflare tunnel hmanga siam a ni
entries.typeTunnelD: *.trycloudflare.com address a thlawna hman theih a ni. Account a ngai lo. Tunnel a restart chuan URL a inthlak thin — ephemeral angin treat rawh.
entries.typeTorD: .onion address, Tor hmang chauha thlen theih. Censor-proof, a slow zawk. Tor client emaw bridge emaw a mamawh.
entries.typeIpfsD: Static frontend atanga content-addressed copy a awm. IPFS gateway eng atang pawhin service a ni — server pakhat mah block tur a awm lo.
entries.typeDirectT: A rilru a buai em em a. HTTPS .
entries.typeDirectD: Domain pangngai + TLS a ni. A chak ber mahse DNS/IP level-ah block theih a ni.

mirrors.title: Mirror site hrang hrangah
mirrors.lede: He site ang chiah chiah signed content rawngbâwlna hmun dang. I DNS/ISP-ah vortexx.sol block a nih chuan a tangkai hle. Mirror tin hi a hun hunah check thin a ni — colored dot hian probe result hnuhnung ber a tarlang a ni.
mirrors.healthyD: Minute 5 hnuhnung berah probed a ni a, OK tiin a chhang. Tunah hian hman atan a him. Card-ah hian latency a lang a.
mirrors.unreachableD: Probe hnuhnung ber a hlawhchham — connection a duh lo, timeout, 5xx. Mirror chu a down emaw, a block emaw, a overload emaw pawh a ni thei. A dawt leh tur chu han ti ve teh.
mirrors.noprobeD: Tor .onion mirrors hi local Tor proxy tel lo chuan health-check theih a ni lo. Status hriat a ni lo — test nan Tor browser hmang rawh.

security.title: Security model a ni
security.lede: Cryptographically verified dik tak, eng nge verified loh, leh system chhunga key tin hian i rinna an hlawh chhuah — emaw an hloh — dan te. Nangmah ngeiin i kalpui loh controller-ah client thar i connect hmain hei hi chhiar hmasa phawt ang che.
security.treasurySub: Solana wallet chuan protocol fee (node ​​thar atanga fee register + premium subscription 20% cut) a dawng a, a bak chu active operator te hnenah lawmman atan a sem chhuak thin. Tu pawhin inflows/outflows on-chain-in an audit thei.
security.treasury1: On-chain transparency — a chunga address hi Solana Name Service-a §vortexx.sol neitu a ni. Influw zawng zawng (register fees, subscriptions) leh lawmman pek chhuah zawng zawng hi signed Solana transaction a ni — tu pawhin an finfiah theih, nangmah pawh tel vein.
security.treasury2: Fee split — Premium subscription tin atanga 70% chu rewards pool-ah a kal (distributed pro-rata to nodes by usage + stake), 20% chu core development atan funds a ni a, 10% chu halral / insurance anga vawn a ni. Register fee anchor node identity leh anti-sybil.
security.treasury3: Custody caveat — payout smart contract hman a nih hma chuan treasury chu temporary custodian angin a thawk thin. Hei hi hetah hian rinawm takin document a ni a, vantlang hriatah track a ni bawk. Smart contract hian audit + on-chain governance a lands hnuah manual custody a thlak dawn a ni.
security.wrongTitle: 6. Thil engemaw a lang dik lo a nih chuan
